description: The `microsoft.dynamics365.finance.tax` connector provides APIs for tax configuration in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance. It covers sales tax codes and groups, withholding tax, and country-specific tax settings including Brazil (CFOP, CST), India (GST, HSN), Switzerland (ISR), Belgium (Intervat), Poland (NIP), and Norway (NRT).
key-features: Sales tax codes, sales tax groups, and item sales tax groups
Withholding tax code and group configuration
Electronic fiscal document (EFDoc) setup for Brazil
India-specific GST and HSN code management
Country-specific tax reporting (Intervat, ISR, NRT, NIP)
